_comment: PLACEHOLDER - Replace this file with your actual google-services.json from the Firebase Console.
_instructions: 2. Create a new project (or use an existing one)
3. Add an Android app with package name: com.matrimony.app
4. Download google-services.json and replace this file
5. For iOS: download GoogleService-Info.plist and place it in ios/Runner/
6. Enable Cloud Messaging in the Firebase Console
7. Copy the Firebase service account key JSON to the Spring Boot backend:
